parameters.query:
SELECT cf.id, cf.nom, cf.email, sub.montant_mensuel
FROM client_finals cf
LEFT JOIN subscriptions sub ON sub.client_id = cf.id
WHERE cf.partner_id = '{{ $input.all()[0].json.partner_id }}'
ORDER BY cf.created_at DESC;

SELECT cf.id, cf.nom, cf.email, sub.montant_mensuel, cff.nom as parent_nom
FROM client_finals cf
JOIN client_finals cff ON cff.id = cf.apporteur_client_id
LEFT JOIN subscriptions sub ON sub.client_id = cf.id
WHERE cff.partner_id = '{{ $input.all()[0].json.partner_id }}'
ORDER BY cf.created_at DESC;

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) as mois, statut, SUM(montant) as total
FROM commissions
WHERE partner_id = '{{ $input.all()[0].json.partner_id }}'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at), statut
ORDER BY mois DESC;
